# Shoryavardhaan Gupta

> 16-year-old builder and developer from Kolkata, India. Shipping civic tech, hardware, and AI projects since age 14. India Innovates 2026 Top 1,000 of 26,000+ entries.

## Portfolio
https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/

## Projects

- [Buy4Chai](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/project/buy4chai): Self-hosted UPI/Razorpay supporter pages for Indian developers who can't access Stripe. Open source, MIT license, deploy to Vercel in 10 minutes.
- [SarkarSathi](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/project/sarkarsathi): AI-powered civic tech platform for navigating Indian government services. India Innovates 2026 Top 1,000 of 26,000+ entries.
- [LiFi Network](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/project/lifi-network): Disaster-resilient mesh network using light-based communication (LiFi). CBSE Regional Science Exhibition 2025-26 finalist.
- [ChemX](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/project/chemx): Interactive chemistry learning tool for students.
- [Planning Research](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/project/planning-research): AI planning research on object commitment in LLM agents. Published on Zenodo at age 15. DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.18196407

## Writing

- [Nobody told me to start. That was the point.](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/why-i-build): Origin post — on building real things from Kolkata at 16, without permission, without an ecosystem, and what two years of shipping actually teaches.
- [Why Indian developers can't get paid online — and how I fixed it](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/building-buy4chai): How a Reddit thread confirmed the gap was real, and building Buy4Chai to fill it.
- [Markets don't get disrupted. They get aged out.](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/markets-dont-get-disrupted): Why the quiet danger isn't AI taking jobs — it's the next generation of buyers not having the gap in the first place.
- [Apple's been playing a different game since 2017](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/apple-ai-decade): How Apple built AI silicon before AI was the thing to build for.
- [Both groups are losing. Just differently.](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/both-groups-are-losing): On students who ship without understanding vs. students who learn syntax while the world moves on.
- [Why "needs vs. wants" is the wrong framework](https://shoryavardhaan.vercel.app/blog/hardware-failure): Teaching financial literacy to a generation running on algorithmic desire engines.
